ogTitle: Tyrendarra vs Tyrendarra East: Climate Safety

heading: Tyrendarra vs Tyrendarra East — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Tyrendarra, Victoria and Tyrendarra East, Victoria. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Tyrendarra East has a lower overall climate risk score (38/100) compared to Tyrendarra (38/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Tyrendarra or Tyrendarra East safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Tyrendarra has a flood risk score of 33/100, while Tyrendarra East scores 28/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Tyrendarra scores 42/100 for bushfire risk. Tyrendarra East scores 43/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Tyrendarra or Tyrendarra East?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Tyrendarra East has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.18% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
